title: Verify that the 'Fuel calculator' header is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Verify that the 'Fuel calculator' header is displayed at the top of the screen.
expected_result: The 'Fuel calculator' header is displayed at the top of the screen.

title: Navigate through all menu options
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on each menu option: 'Mileage log', 'Fuel consumption', 'Travel cost', 'Vehicles', 'Settings', and 'About ...'. | Verify that each menu option leads to its respective screen.
expected_result: Each menu option leads to its respective screen.

title: Verify that the 'My other apps' section is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Verify that the 'My other apps' section is displayed with app icons and names.
expected_result: The 'My other apps' section is displayed with app icons and names.

title: Verify that the navigation buttons in the footer are clickable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on each navigation button in the footer. | Verify that each navigation button leads to its respective screen.
expected_result: Each navigation button in the footer leads to its respective screen.

title: Verify that all menu options are accessible
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Use accessibility features to verify that all menu options are accessible.
